features: Fixed database path resolution: DB now lives at <binary-dir>/data/ instead of CWD-relative output dir
Added store.OpenDefault() and store.OpenDefaultProfile() for binary-relative database access
Added store/location.go with BinaryDataDir() using os.Executable + EvalSymlinks
Updated all 13 database callers across the codebase
Removed unused resolveAuditOutputDir and resolveDefaultOutputDir functions
